title: ZXSnake Controls
description: Practical control guidance for building stable movement patterns across all ZXSnake sessions.
summary: Controlled direction changes and consistent rhythm are the biggest drivers of longer runs.
sourceNotes: Control mapping terminology uses shipped platform terminology where available; verify exact layout before freezing.
This page intentionally avoids undocumented micro-tuning details.

sections.heading: Input basics
paragraphs: Keep direction changes clean and deliberate.
Small corrective inputs usually perform better than aggressive, frequent changes.

sections.heading: Consistency habits
paragraphs: Use shorter sessions to test a single control habit before extending game duration.
If performance drops, reset your pace and re-establish a simple rhythm.
bullets: Focus on reading movement intent before reacting

images.caption: Reference image for control rhythm and screen layout
